implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Publisher function accepting BasePayload and publishing MemoryEpisodeV1
Routing contract: content_format='json' and payload_type for DeterministicWriter dispatch
Canonical JSON body serialization with round-trip guarantee
Deterministic episode_id from natural_key for idempotent publish
Comprehensive test coverage with all contract assertions

completion_promises.criterion_text: src/fleet_memory/reindex/publisher.py exposes a publisher that accepts a BasePayload and publishes a MemoryEpisodeV1 onto the MEMORY stream
completion_promises.evidence: publish_episode() function exists in publisher.py (lines 39-79) that accepts BasePayload parameter and publishes to MEMORY stream via broker.publish(episode_data, subject='MEMORY'). Function signature matches contract and implementation uses module-level broker singleton from app.py.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The published episode has content_format == 'json' and payload_type == payload.payload_type, so RelayService._ingest_json routes it to the DeterministicWriter rather than the prose chunker
completion_promises.evidence: Episode construction (lines 69-76) sets content_format='json' (line 72) and payload_type=payload.payload_type (line 74). Test test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type verifies episode.content_format == 'json' and episode.payload_type == 'adr' for the test payload, ensuring correct relay routing.

completion_promises.criterion_text: body is the payload's canonical JSON serialization and round-trips: get_model_for_type(episode.payload_type)(**json.loads(episode.body)) reconstructs an equal payload
completion_promises.evidence: Body is serialized with json.dumps(payload.model_dump(mode='json'), sort_keys=True, separators=(',', ':')) (lines 62-66) for canonical representation with stable key ordering and minimal whitespace. Test test_body_round_trips_through_registry (lines 86-111) verifies full round-trip equality: reconstructed = get_model_for_type(episode.payload_type)(**json.loads(episode.body)) equals original_payload.

completion_promises.criterion_text: source_ref carries the source document reference; episode_id is derived deterministically from the payload natural_key (so a re-publish of the same parsed document is idempotent at the JetStream Msg-Id layer as well as downstream)
completion_promises.evidence: episode_id derived via _derive_episode_id(payload.natural_key) (line 59) using SHA-256 hash truncated to 16 hex chars with 'ep-' prefix (lines 23-36). source_ref copied from payload.source_ref (line 75). Test test_episode_id_deterministic_for_natural_key (lines 114-142) verifies same natural_key yields identical episode_id across multiple publishes. Test test_source_ref_preserved (lines 168-182) verifies source_ref passes through correctly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No language-model, cloud, or frontier-model request is made by the publisher (asserted by test — e.g. no network egress / no LLM client constructed)
completion_promises.evidence: Publisher is pure transformation using only hashlib, json stdlib modules and broker.publish. No LLM client imports (no openai, anthropic, langchain, etc.). No HTTP client construction. Test test_no_network_calls_during_publish (lines 145-165) mocks broker to prevent NATS connection and verifies function completes without network activity.

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/unit/reindex/test_publisher.py asserts content_format, payload_type, body round-trip, and deterministic episode_id
completion_promises.evidence: Comprehensive test suite with 5 test functions: test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type (content_format and payload_type assertions), test_body_round_trips_through_registry (full round-trip equality via registry), test_episode_id_deterministic_for_natural_key (deterministic episode_id verification), test_no_network_calls_during_publish (no LLM/cloud calls), test_source_ref_preserved (provenance tracking). All tests pass (5/5). Uses mock_broker fixture for isolated testing without live NATS.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Black formatting check passed: 'All done! ✨ 🍰 ✨ 2 files would be left unchanged.' Ruff linting check passed: 'All checks passed!' Both publisher.py and test_publisher.py conform to project code style (PEP 8, type hints, docstrings, 88 char line limit).
